vision: 360 degree Growth Revenue Agency Operating System
mission: Orchestrate client growth across all revenue channels through synchronized domain execution, intelligence-driven decision making, scalable operational systems, and integrated revenue architecture.

edges.exchange: Sector intelligence defines economic arena, ICP, language, constraints, category maturity, and proof requirements.
edges.kpi_impact: offer-market fit, pricing confidence, conversion rate

edges.exchange: Offer supplies promise, mechanism, value stack, proof, CTA, pricing frame, and risk reducers.
edges.failure_impact: Marketing creates attention that cannot convert.

edges.exchange: Marketing passes qualified demand, source context, lead score, campaign promise, and attribution data.
edges.kpi_impact: pipeline velocity, SQL rate, win rate
edges.failure_impact: Sales loses context and wastes follow-up.

edges.exchange: Sales transfers promises, discovery, stakeholders, risks, success criteria, and contract context.
Client data becomes delivery plan, SLA, capacity demand, quality feedback, and SOP updates.
edges.kpi_impact: SLA, time to value, margin, utilization
edges.failure_impact: Operations works blind and rework increases.

edges.exchange: Operations emits cost, capacity, utilization, delivery margin, vendor, payroll, and project economics.
edges.failure_impact: Finance cannot see profit quality or cash needs.

edges.exchange: Finance compresses liquidity, risk, profitability, allocation, forecast, and scale capacity into decisions.
edges.kpi_impact: runway, EBITDA, decision latency, growth capacity

edges.exchange: Automation reads rules, events, data contracts, prompts, and approval boundaries; writes logs, dashboards, memory, and actions.
edges.kpi_impact: cycle time, uptime, error rate, leverage

edges.exchange: Legal governs claims, contracts, privacy, compliance, payment terms, IP, risk acceptance, and approval gates.
edges.kpi_impact: compliance incidents, approval SLA, contract risk

edges.exchange: Hiring converts capacity gaps and capability needs into roles, onboarding, training, and accountability.
